title: mentha pulegium var. tomentella
intro: Mentha pulegium var. tomentella, also known as woolly pennyroyal, is a variant of the pennyroyal plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic agent, which helps to soothe digestive issues and relieve menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Mentha pulegium var. tomentella include its potential to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, bloating, and nausea, as well as its use as a natural insect repellent and antiseptic. Herbal preparations of woolly pennyroyal can be consumed as tea, added to topical creams or ointments, or used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
